meeting_scheduled.subject: Human First AI Meeting Scheduled: {{title}}
meeting_scheduled.body: A new Think Tank meeting has been scheduled for your group.
meeting_scheduled.closing: We look forward to seeing you there.

verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.body: Thanks for signing up! Please verify your email address by clicking the button below:
verification.link_fallback: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
verification.ignore_notice: If you didn't create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

circle_invitation.subject: You're invited to join {{pool_name}}
circle_invitation.body: You've been invited to join {{pool_name}}, where you'll connect with peers for meaningful conversations and mutual support.
circle_invitation.link_fallback: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:

member_moved.subject: You've been moved to {{to_group}}
member_moved.body: You've been moved to a new group in {{pool_name}}.
member_moved.info: Your new group members are looking forward to connecting with you. Visit your circles page to see your new group and schedule meetings.

password_reset.subject: Reset your password
password_reset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password:
password_reset.link_fallback: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
password_reset.ignore_notice: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

daily_reminder.subject: Your daily wellbeing check-in
daily_reminder.body: Start your day with a quick check-in and today's micro-course.
daily_reminder.checkin_text: Take a moment to reflect on how you're feeling and set your intention for the day.
daily_reminder.closing: Small steps lead to big changes. Have a great day!
daily_reminder.unsubscribe_note: You are receiving this email because you opted in to daily reminders. You can update your preferences in your account settings.
